response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~13 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling), but falls well short of this Director-level Principal Engineer role. The JD requires 15+ years, recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership advising strategic customers — none of which are evidenced. No advanced degree, no track record of AI products at scale, and no evidence of executive-level technical influence.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps
Community engagement via talks, workshops, and open-source GIS platform
concerns: Experience (~13 yrs) below the 15-year minimum and seniority gap vs. Director-level IC
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of cloud/AI strategy leadership or advising strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority and scope below Principal/Director IC level
